# Forge DevKit

> Architecture-aware AI development pipeline by Reumbra

Forge DevKit is a commercial plugin ecosystem for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf). One command scans your repository - stack, layers, patterns - and generates guardrails your AI actually follows.

## Key Facts
- One-time purchase: EUR 29 (Core), EUR 79 (Pro), EUR 149 (Bundle)
- 7-gate architecture audit with 50+ quality patterns
- 6 modules: forge-core, forge-product, forge-qa, forge-tracker, forge-autopilot, forge-worktree
- Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any AI agent that reads .claude/ or .cursorrules
- Disposable meta-tool: generated artifacts work independently after setup
- 14-day money-back guarantee

## Modules
- forge-core: Architecture audit, quality patterns, dev-skills generation
- forge-product: Feature design in business language, user stories with acceptance criteria
- forge-qa: Test generation from requirements, requirement traceability matrix
- forge-tracker: Task tracker sync (GitHub, ClickUp, Linear, Notion, Jira)
- forge-autopilot: Parallel agent orchestration, conflict detection, wave execution
- forge-worktree: Git worktree lifecycle management

## Links
- Website: https://forge.reumbra.com
- Pricing: https://forge.reumbra.com/pricing
- Getting Started: https://forge.reumbra.com/docs/getting-started
- Usage Guide: https://forge.reumbra.com/docs/usage-guide
